response.overview: This story is an approach to 3 days in a life of a father of a high class family. He is stern and hardworking. It leads us to his daily routine, the mere description of a life dedicated to his family’s joy and welfare and he is pampered by them in return. To this routine is added up the absence of his elder son. Not him either his family knows exactly where he is. They don’t know how he left or why he did so. Nevertheless, he suffers a failed attempt of kidnap the very same night his family assumed his elder son would have called. This story does not pretend to explain the life of the characters. It is a view of how such things in routine life can suggest some other and how these transcend in its own way.
response.title: Círculo Lejano
